Applying to 10110111
Input
0 1
1 0
2 1
3 1
4 0
5 1
6 1
7 1
Output
0 I1 = 0
1 I2 = 1
2 I3 = 1
3 XOR40 = XOR(0,1) = 1

\boxed{01111000}
